title: Impasto Impressionism
description: Ce style capture l'essence énergique de l'impressionnisme moderne grâce à des techniques de peinture à l'huile en empâtement lourd. Il se caractérise par des coups de couteau à palette épais et très texturés, un mélange optique vibrant des couleurs, et des crêtes de peinture brillantes qui créent une surface profondément tactile et tridimensionnelle.
description_en: This style captures the energetic essence of modern impressionism through heavy impasto oil painting techniques. It features thick, highly textured palette knife strokes, vibrant optical color mixing, and glossy ridges of paint that create a deeply tactile, three-dimensional surface.
description_fr: Ce style capture l'essence énergique de l'impressionnisme moderne grâce à des techniques de peinture à l'huile en empâtement lourd. Il se caractérise par des coups de couteau à palette épais et très texturés, un mélange optique vibrant des couleurs, et des crêtes de peinture brillantes qui créent une surface profondément tactile et tridimensionnelle.
prompt: Heavy impasto oil painting executed with energetic, thick palette knife strokes, channeling modern impressionism. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. The rendering technique relies entirely on the physical accumulation of paint, featuring deep 3D relief, glossy ridges, and scumbled textures where colors are dragged over one another. Forego smooth blending in favor of optical color mixing, placing distinct, unblended dabs of highly saturated hues side-by-side. The color palette is driven by a dominant {{primary_color}}, aggressively juxtaposed with vibrant strikes of {{accent_color}} and rich undertones of {{secondary_color}}. Lighting is expressed not through smooth gradients, but through stark value contrasts and bright, glossy specular highlights catching the raised edges of the impasto strokes, simulating a dynamic, naturalistic light source striking a wet oil surface. Edges of forms are ragged, painterly, and organic, defined solely by overlapping blocks of thick paint rather than any drawn contours or outlines. The spatial dynamics rely on scale and color temperature shifts, maintaining a highly tactile, expressive, and rhythmic atmosphere across the entire composition., heavy impasto, oil painting, palette knife, modern impressionism, thick paint relief, scumbled texture, optical color mixing, glossy ridges, tactile canvas, expressive strokes, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A pure environmental backdrop executed in heavy impasto oil painting with thick palette knife strokes. The scene features an abstract, impressionistic landscape or atmospheric depth composed entirely of unblended dabs of paint. Dominant {{primary_color}} establishes the foundation, interwoven with dynamic scrapes of {{accent_color}} and deep shadows of {{secondary_color}}. Glossy ridges of thick paint catch the light, creating a highly tactile, rhythmic surface with scumbled textures and ragged color transitions, conveying a vibrant, energetic atmosphere without any specific focal subjects.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure environmental backdrop executed in heavy impasto oil painting with thick palette knife strokes. The scene features an abstract, impressionistic landscape or atmospheric depth composed entirely of unblended dabs of paint. Dominant {{primary_color}} establishes the foundation, interwoven with dynamic scrapes of {{accent_color}} and deep shadows of {{secondary_color}}. Glossy ridges of thick paint catch the light, creating a highly tactile, rhythmic surface with scumbled textures and ragged color transitions, conveying a vibrant, energetic atmosphere without any specific focal subjects. A decorative foreground frame made of thick, expressive impasto paint splatters and sweeping palette knife marks acts as an overlay, creating depth in front of the invisible subject. Both the impressionistic backdrop and the heavy textured frame transition organically into the flat {{background_color}} surface, with the thick paint edges casting subtle implied shadows against the {{background_color}}.
